name: Claris FileMaker Admin API
description: The FileMaker Admin API v2 is a REST API that allows web services to perform administrative tasks on FileMaker Cloud and FileMaker Server. It returns data in JSON format and supports authentication, database management, client management, schedule management, server configuration, and more.
